page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. This dedicated CPU configuration provides 12 physical cores and 12 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz, supported by a 35 MB L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor, features a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps, and does not include local storage or bundled GPUs.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance consistently in the average performance tier. The stress-ng single-core CPU score is 1438.78, while the multi-core score reaches 11511.8. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 642.07 GB/sec, which drops to 72.53 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, and a write bandwidth of 43.69 GB/sec. In application-specific tests, the server achieves a Geekbench multi-core score of 6470.0 and a Passmark database operations score of 4512.85. Redis SET operations perform at 11.25 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput reaches 10.16 GB/sec.

For language model processing, the instance handles small 135M models with a text generation speed of 165.49 tokens per second, but performance drops to a weak 17.47 tokens per second for prompt processing on medium 7B models, indicating a clear limitation for larger AI workloads due to the lack of GPU acceleration. Given the dedicated Intel Xeon cores and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for general-purpose workloads, software compilation, web serving, and moderate database operations that require consistent CPU performance without local storage requirements.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.3xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 3.1 GHz, paired with 48.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps and does not include local storage or GPU hardware. Benchmark data indicates average multi-core CPU performance with a stress-ng score of 11511.8 and a Passmark database score of 4512.85. The instance demonstrates solid capabilities in standard tasks, achieving 11.25 million operations per second in Redis SET tests and 10.16 GB/sec in static web serving. However, it exhibits limited performance on larger AI workloads, processing medium 7B LLM prompts at 17.47 tokens per second. This server is best suited for general-purpose workloads, software compilation, web serving, and database operations requiring dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.3xlarge is an x86_64 server with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 48 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering stable mid-tier performance for general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.3xlarge is a KVM-based x86_64 server featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 48 GB RAM for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated twelve-core Intel Xeon server with balanced memory and baseline network performance for stable general-purpose and database workloads.

48.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No local storage or GPU acceleration included
Suitable for web serving, software compilation, and database operations
